summary: All 17+ PATCH endpoints verified for partial updates across admin CRUD entities. Tests covered: success cases, empty body validation (400), not found (404), auth requirements. 61/61 tests passed including regression tests for PUT endpoints.

test_categories_covered.auth_requirement: 4/4 - Verified PATCH endpoints require auth token

critical_code_review_comments: All PATCH endpoints correctly implement: Dict body acceptance, _id/id stripping, empty body 400, not found 404, MongoDB $set for partial updates
All endpoints require Bearer token authentication
No regression issues detected with existing PUT endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 PATCH endpoints fully tested. Each endpoint: accepts Dict body, strips _id/id fields, returns 400 for empty body, returns 404 for non-existent ID, uses MongoDB $set for partial updates, requires auth token. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_patch_endpoints.py covers all scenarios.
